recommendation: Cursor/input boundary design selected cursor.sync_gsettings_theme as a future one-row cursor-theme-sync-policy smoke subset. No rows were enabled; display/render and debug/crash remain blocked.

buckets.exactBlockerBeforeEnablement: needs independent watchdog process plus CLI/token confirmation; live execution remains disabled this sprint
buckets.recommendedSplit: start with non-display-critical display/render subset that has boolean or finite-choice validators

buckets.exactBlockerBeforeEnablement: confirmation and recovery cannot depend on mouse, cursor visibility, Hyprland keybinds, or app UI
buckets.recommendedSplit: split pointer/cursor rows away from lower-impact input toggles after watchdog process proof

buckets.exactBlockerBeforeEnablement: requires process survivability, persisted plan ownership, and crash/failure result handling before enablement
buckets.recommendedSplit: split debug toggles from explicit crash/testing controls; keep not-recommended rows blocked until dedicated approval

nextBlockerBeforeEnablement: Run a dedicated cursor/input enablement sprint proving validator, fixture/temp config, independent watchdog, and recovery independence from mouse/cursor/keybind/app UI before enabling cursor.sync_gsettings_theme.
